mapper.sql: id, product_id, title, image, original_price, seckill_price, stock_count, start_time, end_time, create_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM seckill_product ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE seckill_product SET stock_count = stock_count - 1 WHERE product_id = #{productId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND stock_count > 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO seckill_product (product_id, title, image, original_price, seckill_price, stock_count, start_time, end_time, create_time) VALUES (#{productId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{image,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{originalPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{seckillPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{stockCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.update: UPDATE seckill_product SET title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, image = #{image,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, original_price = #{originalPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, seckill_price = #{seckillPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, stock_count = #{stockCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, start_time = #{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, end_time = #{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM seckill_product WHERE stock_count < #{threshold,jdbcType=INTEGER}
